## Meeting Purpose

[Align on on-site takeaways, action items, and discuss client account statuses and strategies.](https://fathom.video/share/ZXwLrty7y29aRJmJrr_SQtRaS_gLoEmA?tab=summary&timestamp=33.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Proactive bottleneck addressing and artifact creation/tweaking are key priorities](https://fathom.video/share/ZXwLrty7y29aRJmJrr_SQtRaS_gLoEmA?tab=summary&timestamp=65.0)
  - [Need for improved visibility on account health, growth, and potential issues](https://fathom.video/share/ZXwLrty7y29aRJmJrr_SQtRaS_gLoEmA?tab=summary&timestamp=600.0)
  - [Transition to a more structured weekly update format using Notion for client tracking](https://fathom.video/share/ZXwLrty7y29aRJmJrr_SQtRaS_gLoEmA?tab=summary&timestamp=557.0)
  - [Focus on addressing client concerns early to prevent churn (50% customer turnover this year)](https://fathom.video/share/ZXwLrty7y29aRJmJrr_SQtRaS_gLoEmA?tab=summary&timestamp=577.0)

## Topics

### On-site Takeaways and Action Items

  - [Experiment more and address bottlenecks immediately (e.g., publishing, PSEO)](https://fathom.video/share/ZXwLrty7y29aRJmJrr_SQtRaS_gLoEmA?tab=summary&timestamp=71.0)
  - [Create/tweak artifacts for all client requests, refreshing existing ones](https://fathom.video/share/ZXwLrty7y29aRJmJrr_SQtRaS_gLoEmA?tab=summary&timestamp=110.0)
  - [Move towards production, leaning towards boldness in client decision-making](https://fathom.video/share/ZXwLrty7y29aRJmJrr_SQtRaS_gLoEmA?tab=summary&timestamp=147.0)
  - [Positive feedback on project management, communication, and documentation](https://fathom.video/share/ZXwLrty7y29aRJmJrr_SQtRaS_gLoEmA?tab=summary&timestamp=186.0)
  - [Improved ticket prioritization and visibility with new engineering resources](https://fathom.video/share/ZXwLrty7y29aRJmJrr_SQtRaS_gLoEmA?tab=summary&timestamp=223.0)

### Client-Specific Updates

  - [Zooplo: Need to deliver JSON file for API directory (check SOW for specifics)](https://fathom.video/share/ZXwLrty7y29aRJmJrr_SQtRaS_gLoEmA?tab=summary&timestamp=269.0)
  - [Galileo: Potential upsell opportunity, addressing recurring content issues](https://fathom.video/share/ZXwLrty7y29aRJmJrr_SQtRaS_gLoEmA?tab=summary&timestamp=459.0)
  - [Flossum: Lost due to lack of traffic growth](https://fathom.video/share/ZXwLrty7y29aRJmJrr_SQtRaS_gLoEmA?tab=summary&timestamp=487.0)
  - [SIT: Scheduled for a deep dive to address specific feedback](https://fathom.video/share/ZXwLrty7y29aRJmJrr_SQtRaS_gLoEmA?tab=summary&timestamp=493.0)
  - [Answerbase: Delivering high volume (25 articles/week) for relatively low pay](https://fathom.video/share/ZXwLrty7y29aRJmJrr_SQtRaS_gLoEmA?tab=summary&timestamp=521.0)

### Account Health Tracking

  - [Implement a holistic client health dashboard in Notion](https://fathom.video/share/ZXwLrty7y29aRJmJrr_SQtRaS_gLoEmA?tab=summary&timestamp=765.0)
  - [Directors accountable for updating client information](https://fathom.video/share/ZXwLrty7y29aRJmJrr_SQtRaS_gLoEmA?tab=summary&timestamp=806.0)
  - [Track metrics: stakeholder engagement, output delivery, quality perception, performance](https://fathom.video/share/ZXwLrty7y29aRJmJrr_SQtRaS_gLoEmA?tab=summary&timestamp=781.0)

### Risk Management and Client Retention

  - [Address issues early to prevent late-stage churn (e.g., Credit Karma case)](https://fathom.video/share/ZXwLrty7y29aRJmJrr_SQtRaS_gLoEmA?tab=summary&timestamp=841.0)
  - [Leverage increased headcount (29+ active customers, more delivery team members)](https://fathom.video/share/ZXwLrty7y29aRJmJrr_SQtRaS_gLoEmA?tab=summary&timestamp=900.0)
  - [Ensure clients feel they have dedicated support focused on their growth](https://fathom.video/share/ZXwLrty7y29aRJmJrr_SQtRaS_gLoEmA?tab=summary&timestamp=913.0)

### Workload Distribution

  - [Darrell now managing four accounts after recent transitions](https://fathom.video/share/ZXwLrty7y29aRJmJrr_SQtRaS_gLoEmA?tab=summary&timestamp=1004.0)
  - [Multiple accounts ending in next 2-3 weeks](https://fathom.video/share/ZXwLrty7y29aRJmJrr_SQtRaS_gLoEmA?tab=summary&timestamp=1013.0)
  - [Potential account redistribution: town.com, engine.com, Biologica (possibly to Jess)](https://fathom.video/share/ZXwLrty7y29aRJmJrr_SQtRaS_gLoEmA?tab=summary&timestamp=1029.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Update Notion with client information (Directors responsible, Andy to oversee)](https://fathom.video/share/ZXwLrty7y29aRJmJrr_SQtRaS_gLoEmA?tab=summary&timestamp=953.0)
  - [Implement weekly accountability check in this meeting slot](https://fathom.video/share/ZXwLrty7y29aRJmJrr_SQtRaS_gLoEmA?tab=summary&timestamp=960.0)
  - [Review deliverables vs. actual delivery for all accounts (Andy leading)](https://fathom.video/share/ZXwLrty7y29aRJmJrr_SQtRaS_gLoEmA?tab=summary&timestamp=975.0)
  - [Begin handoff process for stable accounts (e.g., engine.com) to pods](https://fathom.video/share/ZXwLrty7y29aRJmJrr_SQtRaS_gLoEmA?tab=summary&timestamp=1066.0)
  - [Darrell to be involved in newly stabilized accounts](https://fathom.video/share/ZXwLrty7y29aRJmJrr_SQtRaS_gLoEmA?tab=summary&timestamp=1023.0)
  - [Continue monitoring at-risk accounts and raising flags early](https://fathom.video/share/ZXwLrty7y29aRJmJrr_SQtRaS_gLoEmA?tab=summary&timestamp=1077.0)
